input.user_input: Revise the payment schedule in Exhibit B so that milestone payments align with the updated project timeline I described in our last conversation.

actual:
I don't have access to our previous conversations or the document you are referring to. 

To help you revise the payment schedule, please upload the document containing Exhibit B and provide the details of the updated project timeline. Once you share those, I can update the milestones for you.
